---
title: "Construction Decisions"
---

What was decided when building the clean assets and the sample panels, and **why**. Full per-dataset
detail is in each cleaning script's companion `.md` (`scripts/02_clean/`).

## Cross-cutting conventions

| Decision | Why |
|---|---|
| **Facility key = `PGM_SYS_ID`** (ICIS-Air program-system id) | The unit regulation attaches to; `REGISTRY_ID` is carried for cross-system (FRS) joins. |
| **Dates parsed with `mdy()`** | The source mixes `mm/dd/yyyy` and `mm-dd-yyyy`; a single-format parser would silently drop rows. |
| **Analysis window applied at panel build**, not baked into assets | Assets keep all dated events, reusable for any window. |
| **Undated / unkeyable rows dropped — never imputed** | A record with no facility id or no parseable date can't be placed; the count is reported at build time. |
| **No deduplication** — keep all rows, flag `dup` / `dup_exact` | Reversible and transparent: raw and event-level counts are each one filter away, and duplication is auditable in place. |
| **Multi-valued code fields kept as delimited strings** | Splitting would re-inflate the row grain. |

## Per-asset

| Asset | Key choices |
|---|---|
| **inspections** | Pool FCE + PCE into one measure (`type` keeps the distinction); date = `ACTUAL_END_DATE`. |
| **violations** | Date = first non-blank of `EARLIEST_FRV_DETERM_DATE`, `HPV_DAYZERO_DATE`; keep HPV spell endpoints (`hpv_dayzero_date`, `hpv_resolved_date`) as parsed dates. |
| **enforcement** | Pool formal + informal (`kind`); penalty parsed on formal only; event id = `(kind, PGM_SYS_ID, enf_identifier)`; sum penalties over `dup == 0`. |
| **certs** | Date = `ACTUAL_END_DATE`; heavily duplicated at the certification grain (filter `dup == 0`). |
| **stack tests** | Date = `ACTUAL_END_DATE`; `status` (Pass / Fail / Pending / ...); no pollutant detail (empty in source). |
| **facilities** (spine) | Universe = ever-active in window (**all rows**, no-dedup consistent); attributes = current snapshot, one row per facility (no `dup`); coordinates from FRS; county via point-in-county; static `emits_*` and `prog_*` profiles. |

## Sample panels

- **Balanced facility × year** (every in-scope facility × every year in the window).
- **Event-level counts** (`dup == 0`) per measure.
- **Zero semantics:** within an *observed* facility-year (≥ 1 event of some measure) a missing measure is a
  true `0`; an *unobserved* facility-year is `NA` (we cannot assert a zero).
- Built by standalone scripts (`scripts/04_panels/`), one per sample — no configurable builder.
